---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What user-facing problem does this solve? Be specific — "it would be
nice to have" doesn't ship.

## Proposed solution

Sketch the API, UI, or data model. Bullet list is fine.

## Alternatives considered

What did you reject and why?

## Out of scope

Explicit list of things that should NOT be in this change.
